page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A dsl for data-driven computational pipelines http://nextflow.io
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Nextflow enables scalable and reproducible scientific workflows using software containers. It allows the adaptation of pipelines written in the most common scripting languages.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Nextflow enables scalable and reproducible scientific workflows using software containers. It allows the adaptation of pipelines written in the most common scripting languages.
